items.title: Trading Partnerships Act 1841 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make good certain Contracts which have been or may be entered into by certain Banking and other Copartnerships.

items.title: Ordnance Survey Act 1841
items.description: An Act to authorize and facilitate the Completion of a Survey of Great Britain, Berwick upon Tweed, and the Isle of Man.

items.title: Schools Sites Act 1841
items.description: An Act to afford further Facilities for the Conveyance and Endowment of Sites for Schools.

items.title: Ecclesiastical Commissioners Act 1841
items.description: An Act to explain and amend Two several Acts relating to the Ecclesiastical Commissioners for England.

items.title: Bishops in Foreign Countries Act 1841
items.description: An Act to amend an Act made in the Twenty-sixth Year of the Reign of His Majesty King George the Third, intituled “An Act to empower the Archbishop of Canterbury or the Archbishop of York for the Time being to consecrate to the Office of a Bishop Persons being Subjects or Citizens of Countries out of His Majesty’s Dominions.”
